content.body: Thanks, I'll share that internally and try to get some feedback.

I recall someone mentioning global is looked up from realm and not stored permanently, but not sure if they meant during actual lexical lookup. If that's the case, there's still things we could do to ModuleEnvironmentRecord that would stop further lookup no matter what.
I've updated the gist with what I was able to find in Firefox and V8 code that resembles setting OuterEnv on Module Environment
